subject: PR 115 Cursor Bugbot comment
body: Stormy, owner asked me to fetch Cursor Bugbot comments on PR 115 and surface them to you. Live fetch found 1 Cursor Bugbot review comment: pull review comment id 3298656202, review id 4357251791, created 2026-05-25T14:23:34Z, commit 18c2ca0634ad1045f8a5a0794c1887b973fb154d. Path: .agent/plans/agent-tooling/current/human-composer-tui.plan.md, primary line 444, additional location lines 224-241, PR discussion https://github.com/oaknational/oak-open-curriculum-ecosystem/pull/115#discussion_r3298656202. Finding title: Owner sync conflicts ADR-184. Severity: Medium. Finding substance: the plan commits to owner-initiated sync events and HC-A5 ADR-184 validation, while WS0 Path A models the owner as owner_id rather than the agent identity ADR-184 requires for author and participants. WS3 builds the roster from active claims only, so the owner cannot satisfy author-present-in-participants without contradicting Path A or amending ADR-184/WS0. I am only surfacing the comment; I opened no source claim and made no fix attempt.
